module.name: numberline
module.description: A number line with ticks, plus marked points and intervals. Body = one mark per section: a point "3 label" or an interval "[2,5] label".
module.aiSpec:
A NUMBER LINE with ticks, on which you mark points and intervals — for inequalities, domains, ranges, solution sets. Use this for a single 1-D axis; for a 2-D plot use @plot and for a polar curve use @polarplot. Block module body: one mark per section split by <!-- @ -->: • a point: `3` or `3 label`, • an interval: `[2, 5]` (closed) or `(2, 5)` (open), with an optional label, e.g. `[0, 100) valid` — use a big number for infinity. Parameters: • min / max — the numeric range shown on the axis (any real; default 0 and 10). • step — spacing between ticks (must be > 0; default 1). • color — color of the points and intervals (default var(--accent-color)). • ticks — show the numeric label under each tick (true/false, default true). • unit — suffix appended to each tick label, e.g. cm or % (default blank). • arrow — draw the right-hand arrowhead on the axis (true/false, default true). • dotSize — diameter in px of points and interval end-caps (6-24, default 12).
<!-- @numberline min: -1, max: 6, step: 1, unit: cm --> [2, 5] valid <!-- @ --> 0 origin <!-- @end -->

param.name: min
param.label: Min
param.desc: Left-hand value of the axis (any real number).

param.name: max
param.label: Max
param.desc: Right-hand value of the axis (any real number).

param.name: step
param.label: Tick step
param.desc: Spacing between ticks; must be greater than 0.

param.name: color
param.label: Mark color
param.desc: Color of the marked points and intervals.

param.name: ticks
param.label: Tick labels
param.desc: Show the numeric label under each tick.

param.name: unit
param.label: Unit suffix
param.desc: Text appended to every tick label (e.g. cm, %).

param.name: arrow
param.label: Axis arrow
param.desc: Draw the arrowhead on the right end of the axis.

param.name: dotSize
param.label: Dot size (px)
param.desc: Diameter of points and interval end-caps, in pixels.

snippet.label: Number line
snippet.description: Number line with ticks; sections are points ("3 label") or intervals ("[2,5] label").
